backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex grid trading bot with order placement/cancellation, configurable spread/grid parameters, activity logging, and balance queries against ICP and ckBTC ledgers.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom property color tokens for both light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full app layout with a sticky header, BalancePanel, BotControlPanel, ConfigurationPanel, MarketDataPanel, GridPreviewTable, OpenOrdersPanel, TradeHistoryPanel, ActivityLogPanel, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: Displays a scrollable activity log with color-coded event rows, highlighting order errors in red with an ERR badge, using the useActivityLog hook for data.
frontend/src/components/BalancePanel.tsx: Displays the bot's ICP and ckBTC balances fetched via useBalances, showing amber warning badges for zero balances, with loading skeletons and an error/retry state.
React component that displays bot running status and provides Start/Stop controls, showing config summary and error states using React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: React component for editing and saving bot configuration (spread pips, order count, interval, order size) with validation, form state, and a grid preview derived from config values.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: React component that displays a symmetric grid order preview table, comparing backend grid data with open orders and highlighting filled/active levels using config-derived pip spacing.
React component that shows live market data (mid price, best bid/ask, spread in pips, order book depth) with staleness detection and error handling.
React component that lists open ICDex orders sorted by side and price, with formatted price/quantity/timestamp columns and a cancel-all button.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: React component that displays a scrollable, reverse-chronological list of trade history entries with formatted price, quantity, status, and timestamp columns, fetched via the useTradeHistory hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions (bot status, config, trade history, balances, mutations, etc.) with polling intervals and canister health-check helpers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports JetBrains Mono, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines a terminal-themed dark color palette using OKLCH CSS variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens (terminal buy/sell/neutral), custom shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the ICP Grid Trading Bot project, including architectural notes, known issues, and pending feature requests (AR-1 through AR-5) such as adding a depositCkBTC function and auditing backend/frontend code.
